zh.siteSubtitle: 时轮密续（约公元前3世纪）
zh.homeIntro1: 香巴拉预言源自藏传佛教最重要的密续经典之一——时轮密续（Kalachakra Tantra）。传说时轮密续由释迦牟尼佛亲自传授给香巴拉国王月贤王（Suchandra），后经历代传承保存于这个隐秘的王国之中。
zh.homeIntro2: 预言描述了一个被雪山环绕的隐秘净土——香巴拉，由历代觉悟的转轮王统治。当外部世界堕落腐化、蛮族势力肆虐之时，第25代转轮王如意轮（Rudra Cakrin）将率领香巴拉大军从隐秘之地出发，在一场终极圣战中击败邪恶势力。
zh.homeIntro3: 战后，世界将进入一个长达一千八百年的黄金时代——佛法重兴、众生安乐、战争与疾病消失。香巴拉预言对藏传佛教、中亚文化乃至西方神秘学都产生了深远影响，至今仍被无数人视为对人类终极命运的预示。
zh.coreQuote: 「当铁鸟在空中飞翔，铁马在地上奔驰之时，藏人将如蚂蚁般流散世界各地，佛法将传入红人之国。」
keyPointsList: 约公元前3世纪 —— 时轮密续据传由释迦牟尼传授给香巴拉国王月贤王
公元11世纪 —— 时轮密续从印度传入西藏，成为藏传佛教核心经典
第1-7代法王 —— 七位法王（Dharmaraja）统治香巴拉，传承佛法
第1-25代转轮王 —— 二十五位转轮王（Kalki）继续守护王国
末法时代 —— 蛮族势力扩张，世界陷入黑暗与堕落
如意轮降世 —— 第25代转轮王率军出战，终极圣战击败邪恶
黄金时代 —— 战后佛法重兴，人类进入一千八百年的和平盛世
sourceList: 预言内容整理自时轮密续（Kalachakra Tantra）及相关藏传佛教文献（Wikipedia: Kalachakra）
香巴拉传说背景参考自学术研究与百科资料（Wikipedia: Shambhala）
验证评价基于历史记录与学术研究共识
编者观点不代表学术定论
站点图标采用雪山峰形——香巴拉被描述为隐藏在雪山环绕之中的神秘王国，山峰是其最具辨识度的意象

en.homeIntro1: The Shambhala prophecy originates from the Kalachakra Tantra, one of the most important esoteric texts in Tibetan Buddhism. According to tradition, the Kalachakra was personally taught by Shakyamuni Buddha to King Suchandra of Shambhala, and has been preserved through generations within this hidden kingdom.
en.homeIntro2: The prophecy describes Shambhala as a hidden pure land surrounded by snow mountains, ruled by a lineage of enlightened Kalki kings. When the outside world falls into corruption and barbarian forces run rampant, the 25th Kalki king, Rudra Cakrin, will lead the armies of Shambhala forth from their hidden realm to defeat evil in a final great battle.
en.homeIntro3: After the battle, the world will enter a golden age lasting 1,800 years — the Dharma will flourish anew, all beings will live in peace, and war and disease will vanish. The Shambhala prophecy has profoundly influenced Tibetan Buddhism, Central Asian culture, and Western esotericism, and continues to be regarded by many as a vision of humanity's ultimate destiny.
en.coreQuote: "When the iron bird flies and horses run on wheels, the Tibetan people will be scattered like ants across the world, and the Dharma will come to the land of the red man."
keyPointsList: c. 3rd century BCE —— Kalachakra Tantra reportedly taught by Shakyamuni Buddha to King Suchandra of Shambhala
11th century CE —— Kalachakra Tantra transmitted from India to Tibet, becoming a core Tibetan Buddhist text
Dharmarajas 1-7 —— Seven Dharma Kings rule Shambhala and preserve the Buddhist teachings
Kalki Kings 1-25 —— Twenty-five Kalki kings continue to guard the kingdom
Age of Decline —— Barbarian forces expand, the world descends into darkness and corruption
Rudra Cakrin Emerges —— The 25th Kalki king leads armies forth in the final battle against evil
Golden Age —— After the battle, Dharma flourishes anew; humanity enters 1,800 years of peace
sourceList: Prophecy content compiled from the Kalachakra Tantra and related Tibetan Buddhist texts (Wikipedia: Kalachakra)
Shambhala legend background referenced from academic research and encyclopedic sources (Wikipedia: Shambhala)
Verification based on historical records and academic research consensus
Editorial opinions do not represent academic consensus
Site icon: snow peak motif — Shambhala is described as a hidden kingdom surrounded by snow-capped mountains, making the mountain peak its most recognizable visual symbol
